race.comment: SUPERMASSIVE (5) finds an easier race deep into the prep and finally drawn a decent gate today. Held a forward position from the outside draw with a fighting third over 1400m at Randwick. Can take control early with Tim Clark aboard and prove too slick for these. TARZING (9) good type who must have pleased the stable after defeating Big Papa over this track and trip last Saturday in BM72 grade. Finds a lot more pressure here and doubt he will get the same favours today. Top three contender. INVADER ZIM (13) no match for the promising Glorious Moments last start when fifth over 1400m at Randwick. Genuine place prospect. MONTPELLIER (3) imported gelding who showed promise in his first Australian campaign. Back with the one trial and can produce good closing splits. Respect. SILVANITO (15) ready for this trip third-up and expect to see him much closer to the speed from the good gate. Don't dismiss.
